eventPreCondition: Play if the Fellowship is not in a region containing a Free Peoples Settlement.
eventText:
Draw a Hunt tile.
If the tile shows an Eye or is a Fellowship Special tile, discard it without effect.
Otherwise, follow the rules for a successful Hunt.
combatPreCondition: Play if the total Nazgûl Leadership is 2 or more.
combatText: Forfeit two points of Nazgûl Leadership to add 1 to all dice on your Combat roll.
